Bash(node -e "const z = require\('@zxing/browser'\); const r = new z.BrowserQRCodeReader\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(r\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const z = require\('@zxing/browser'\); const r = new z.BrowserQRCodeReader\(\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(r\); let p = proto; while\(p && p !== Object.prototype\) { console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(p\).join\(', '\)\); p = Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\); }")
